Aggregate-only Game Data API activity history; newest sample per bounded time bucket, hard-capped at 500 rows; persists no actor identities, names, health, or locations
Map tile pyramid provenance (fetched_at/game_version/source), defaulted to a pre-1.0 marker when unset
Pal preview icon image (webp or png), matched case-insensitively

bearerAuth.description: Integration API key, format phk_<8 lowercase hex>_<43 base64url chars> (56 chars total). Created via POST /api/v1/integration-keys; the plaintext is shown exactly once. Scoped to the GET-only /api/integration/v1 group and never accepted by any session-gated route. Treat keys as passwords and serve this API over TLS at the network edge.

IntegrationLimit.name: limit
IntegrationLimit.description: Page size. Out-of-range or non-integer values return 400 invalid_limit.

IntegrationEventLimit.name: limit
IntegrationEventLimit.description: Bounded number of recent public events. Out-of-range or non-integer values return 400 invalid_limit.

IntegrationCursor.name: cursor
IntegrationCursor.description: Opaque keyset cursor from a previous page's nextCursor. Undecodable, wrong-version, or wrong-charset values return 400 invalid_cursor. Never construct this value; treat it as opaque.

IntegrationOnline.name: online
IntegrationOnline.description: When "true", filters to players in the poller's current online set. Any other non-empty value returns 400 invalid_request.

IntegrationIfNoneMatch.name: If-None-Match
IntegrationIfNoneMatch.description: Comma-separated list of ETags (weak comparison) or "*"; a match returns 304 with no body.

IntegrationUID.name: uid
IntegrationUID.description: Must match ^[0-9a-fA-F-]{1,36}$ before any store lookup; anything else returns 404 without a store query.

ETag.description: Weak content-hash ETag (SHA-256 of the response body, first 32 hex chars, W/-prefixed). Present on every integration 200 and echoed unchanged on the resulting 304; never present on 4xx/5xx.

NoStore.description: Always "no-store": set on every /api/integration/v1 response regardless of status, and on every /api/v1/integration-keys response.

RetryAfter.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Present on every 429. On the fail-closed limiter-map-full path this is the full 60s window, since there is no oldest timestamp to compute a tighter value from.

WWWAuthenticate.description: Present on every 401 from the integration group.

Allow.description: Present on every 405 from the integration group.

IntegrationUnauthorized.description: Missing, duplicate, malformed, unknown-id, wrong-secret, or revoked bearer token. Every failure mode returns this identical body and headers - there is no distinguishable variant to probe with.

IntegrationRateLimited.description: The per-key rate limit (default 60 req/min, PALHELM_INTEGRATION_RATE_LIMIT) was exceeded.

IntegrationBadRequest.description: Invalid limit, cursor, or query parameter (invalid_limit / invalid_cursor / invalid_request).

IntegrationMethodNotAllowed.description: The integration router registers only GET handlers; every other method on a real or unknown path is rejected after auth with this envelope.

IntegrationNotModified.description: If-None-Match matched the current representation (weak comparison, member-wise, or a bare "*"). No body.

label.description: Trimmed server-side; 1-64 chars after trimming, control characters rejected. Duplicate labels are allowed - the id disambiguates.

id.description: The public, non-secret key id - the stable handle used in logs, audit events, and the Settings UI.

lastUsedAt.description: Merges the in-memory coalesced value; may be fresher than the last SQLite write (persisted at most once per 60s per key).

revokedAt.description: Set by DELETE; revoked keys are retained (not hard-deleted) and keep appearing here for the audit trail.

key.description: The plaintext bearer key. Present only in this one response, never again - store it now. This example is deliberately fake and does not match the real phk_ token grammar (wrong charset/length on purpose), so it can never validate and never trains a scanner to ignore the prefix.

uid.description: Save-derived GUID; the join key for /players/{uid}, pals[].ownerUid, and guild members.

captureTotal.description: Lifetime RecordData.TribeCaptureCount. Omitted when the player save does not provide it.

uniquePalsCaptured.description: Count of positive species entries in RecordData.PalCaptureCount. Omitted when unavailable.

paldeckUnlocked.description: Count of true RecordData.PaldeckUnlockFlag entries (seen/unlocked, not necessarily caught). Omitted when unavailable.

placement.description: Safe derived placement. base means baseId joined the Pal's worker container; unknown is never inferred as base.

baseId.description: Derived base join key matching guilds[].bases[].id; null unless placement is base. Raw container GUIDs are never exposed.

ownerName.description: Empty string when ownership is unresolved or the joined player has no name.

ownerSource.description: How player attribution was established. last_observed is historical attribution while a Pal is outside a personal container; it is not proof of current possession.

ownerResolved.description: True when ownerUid joins a current public player row. Consult ownerSource for attribution certainty.

nextCursor.description: Opaque; the key of the last row returned. Null whenever fewer than limit rows were returned - an empty data array with a non-null nextCursor never occurs.

message.description: Sanitized player transition, generic Backup completed, or an explicitly allowlisted system state. Event metadata is never exposed.
